results.trackCensoredName: Behind His Smile (A Casey Faith Suspense Thriller—Book 2)
results.trackName: Behind His Smile (A Casey Faith Suspense Thriller—Book 2)
results.description:
When the body of a surfer washes up, seemingly eaten by a shark, local cop Casey Faith senses something more nefarious. With each clue submerged below a small-town’s secrets and lies, it's up to Casey to unearth the truth before another life is caught in the undertow. 
 
 “A brilliant book. I couldn’t put it down and I never guessed who the murderer was!” 
—Reader review for Only Murder 
⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ 
 
BEHIND HIS SMILE (A Casey Faith Suspense Thriller—Book 2) is the second book in a highly anticipated new series by #1 bestseller Rylie Dark, whose bestseller SEE HER RUN (a free download) has received over 700 five star ratings and reviews. The series begins with BEHIND HIS EYES (Book 1). 
 
The CASEY FAITH mystery series is a riveting thriller saga that takes readers on a heart-racing journey of unexpected twists and intense suspense. At its core is an ingenious female protagonist who captures your affection and ensures you'll be captivated well into the night. Fans of Teresa Driscoll, Kendra Eliot, and Melinda Leigh are sure to fall in love. 
 
Future books in the series will soon be available! 
 
“I loved this thriller, read it in one sitting. Lots of twists and turns and I didn’t guess the 
culprit at all… Already pre-ordered the second!”
